problem id: 26c83e22
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00010001 -> 00101000
  10011011 -> 00101101
  00100011 -> 01110001
  00100001 -> 00110000
  10100101 -> 11110010
  10011100 -> 11001110
  00010000 -> 00001000
  10100001 -> 01110000

query: 00110010
predicted answer: 01011001
